tasks.label: Startup smoke Photometry
args: $root='C:\Users\Kay\Desktop\Projects\Photometry'; $out=Join-Path $root '_tmp_app_startup_smoke_out.txt'; $err=Join-Path $root '_tmp_app_startup_smoke_err.txt'; $json=Join-Path $root '_tmp_app_startup_smoke_result.json'; $killed=@(); Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match 'photometry_app\.main' -and $_.ProcessId -ne $PID } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction Stop; $killed += $_.ProcessId } catch {} }; if (Test-Path $out) { Remove-Item $out -Force }; if (Test-Path $err) { Remove-Item $err -Force }; $proc = Start-Process -FilePath (Join-Path $root '.venv\Scripts\python.exe') -ArgumentList '-m','photometry_app.main' -WorkingDirectory $root -RedirectStandardOutput $out -RedirectStandardError $err -PassThru; $timedOut = $false; try { Wait-Process -Id $proc.Id -Timeout 10 -ErrorAction Stop } catch { $timedOut = $true }; if ($timedOut) { $result = [ordered]@{ status='startup_ok'; pid=$proc.Id; killed_previous_pids=$killed }; $result | ConvertTo-Json | Set-Content -Path $json -Encoding UTF8; try { Stop-Process -Id $proc.Id -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {}; exit 0 } else { $exitCode = $proc.ExitCode; $result = [ordered]@{ status='startup_failed'; pid=$proc.Id; exit_code=$exitCode; killed_previous_pids=$killed }; $result | ConvertTo-Json | Set-Content -Path $json -Encoding UTF8; exit 1 }

tasks.label: Startup smoke Photometry python
Startup smoke Photometry python 2
args: import json, os, pathlib, subprocess, sys, time; root=pathlib.Path(r"C:/Users/Kay/Desktop/Projects/Photometry"); out=root/"_tmp_app_startup_smoke_out.txt"; err=root/"_tmp_app_startup_smoke_err.txt"; result_path=root/"_tmp_app_startup_smoke_result.json"; helper_pid=os.getpid(); ps=("Get-CimInstance Win32_Process | Where-Object { $_.CommandLine -match \"photometry_app\\\\.main\" -and $_.ProcessId -ne $PID -and $_.ProcessId -ne %d } | ForEach-Object { try { Stop-Process -Id $_.ProcessId -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }" % helper_pid); subprocess.run(["powershell.exe","-NoProfile","-ExecutionPolicy","Bypass","-Command",ps], check=False); [path.unlink() for path in (out, err, result_path) if path.exists()]; stdout_handle=open(out,"w",encoding="utf-8"); stderr_handle=open(err,"w",encoding="utf-8"); proc=subprocess.Popen([str(root/".venv/Scripts/python.exe"),"-m","photometry_app.main"], cwd=str(root), stdout=stdout_handle, stderr=stderr_handle); time.sleep(10); exit_code=proc.poll(); result={"pid": proc.pid, "status": ("startup_ok" if exit_code is None else "startup_failed"), "exit_code": exit_code}; result_path.write_text(json.dumps(result, indent=2), encoding="utf-8"); stdout_handle.close(); stderr_handle.close(); proc.terminate() if exit_code is None else None; raise SystemExit(0 if exit_code is None else 1)
